chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6293, 6294, 6295, 6296, 6297, 6298, 6299, 6300, 6301, 6302, 6303, 6304, 6305, 6306, 6307, 6308, 6309, 6310, 6311, 7247, 7248, 7249 & 7265 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order Misc. No.22837/2023 2. For hearing of Misc. No.26729/2022 3. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Mr. Tarique Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Messrs. Amna Warsi and Ayesha Warsi, advocates for respondents 2-4 Qazi Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General These petitions have been filed by the retired employees of Civil Aviation Authority assailing an Administrative Order No.18/2022 dated 30.06.2022. At the very onset learned Deputy Attorney General points out that these petitions are not maintainable inter alia as the respondent authority is not governed by any statutory rules. This argument could not be dispelled by the petitioner’s learned counsel. Even otherwise the controversy sought to be agitated could not be determined without recourse to evidence etc. and the same is not amenable to be adjudicated in writ jurisdiction. The impugned administrative order withdraws a previous order on account of being void ab initio on the premise earlier one was rendered without fulfillment of quorum requirements. Since we are not suiting the petitioners on account of forum hence it is preferred not to proffer any opinion in the merits of the case. While the petitioners remained at liberty to agitate their grievances before the forum of appropriate jurisdiction, no case is made out to invoke the writ jurisdiction of this court directly.

Since we are not suiting the petitioners on account of forum hence it is preferred not to proffer any opinion in the merits of the case. While the petitioners remained at liberty to agitate their grievances before the forum of appropriate jurisdiction, no case is made out to invoke the writ jurisdiction of this court directly. Petitions are found to be misconceived, hence, are dismissed. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
